title: Sync Downstream Impact (Leave Management)
acceptanceCriteria: System can perform "Sync Downstream Impact" only when business rules and validations for Leave are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.
businessRules: fromDate must be before or equal to toDate
requested amount must not exceed remaining balance/eligibility
overlapping leave requests for the same requester are not allowed
attachment required when leave type requires supporting evidence
weekend/holiday exclusion rule applies when calculating requested days/units
approver cannot approve their own request
requests cannot be submitted past the configured cutoff window

workflow.name: Request-Approval Workflow
workflow.stateTransition: Request-Approval Workflow -> Leave Management -> Sync Downstream Impact

business.reason: Supports the Request-Approval Workflow business pattern for "Leave Management": Sync Downstream Impact is a mandatory lifecycle step - without it the module cannot transition to the next state.
businessRules: fromDate must be before or equal to toDate
requested amount must not exceed remaining balance/eligibility
overlapping leave requests for the same requester are not allowed
attachment required when leave type requires supporting evidence
weekend/holiday exclusion rule applies when calculating requested days/units
approver cannot approve their own request
requests cannot be submitted past the configured cutoff window

business.stateTransition: Request-Approval Workflow -> Leave Management -> Sync Downstream Impact
business.acceptanceCriteria: System can perform "Sync Downstream Impact" only when business rules and validations for Leave are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.
edgeCases: Sync Downstream Impact attempted with missing/invalid required fields
Sync Downstream Impact attempted by a role without permission
Sync Downstream Impact attempted on a record in an incompatible status

navigation: Detail drawer opens from list row click
Back to list from detail view

positiveTests: Sync Downstream Impact succeeds end-to-end with valid data and an authorized role; status/audit trail updates correctly.
negativeTests: Sync Downstream Impact is rejected when required fields are missing or invalid, with a clear error message.
validationTests: Each business validation listed for Leave Management is independently exercised against Sync Downstream Impact.
permissionTests: Sync Downstream Impact is rejected for any role not listed in this step's authorized roles.
workflowTests: Full lifecycle test: create -> Sync Downstream Impact -> downstream state is consistent with the Request-Approval Workflow pattern.
regressionTests: Medium - secondary step, breaking this degrades but does not block the module
coverageRules: REQ-LEAVE-09 must map to at least one test and one implementation file.

release.rollbackStrategy: Disable or roll back Leave Management Sync Downstream Impact changes while preserving audit data.

automationTests: Positive: Sync Downstream Impact succeeds with valid data and authorized role
Negative: Sync Downstream Impact rejected with invalid data
Access: Sync Downstream Impact rejected for unauthorized role

evidence.status: Pending until coding agent writes evidence.
